name: Manhattan Associates, Inc.
description: Manhattan Associates, Inc. is a global technology leader specializing in supply chain commerce solutions. The company provides a unified, AI-native platform that integrates supply chain planning, warehouse management, transportation management, and omnichannel commerce. By leveraging cloud-native, microservices-based technology, Manhattan Associates helps retailers, manufacturers, and wholesalers optimize their operations, improve inventory accuracy, and enhance customer experiences. Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, the company is recognized for its industry-leading software that enables businesses to adapt to changing market demands and streamline complex global supply chain workflows with shared intelligence and real-time visibility.
